chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Criminal Bail Application No.1538 of 2022 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATUREs OF JUDGEs Disposed of matter 1. For orders on M.A. No.6697/2025 (U/A) 2. For orders on M.A. No.6697/2024 ----------------------------------------------------- 15.05.2025 Mr. Muhammad Nadeem Khan, advocate for applicant Ms. Amna Ansari, Additional Prosecutor General Sindh ------------------------------------------------- 1. Urgency granted. 2. In terms of order dated 27.05.2024, learned trial Court submitted report, which reflects that charge sheet was submitted before VI Civil Judge & Judicial Magistrate Karachi West on 13.05.2023 in which names of Mukhtiar Chandio son of Abdul Kareem and 4 others were placed in Column No.2 of the charge sheet due to lack of evidence. Certified copy of charge sheet has been placed on record. Learned Additional Prosecutor General Sindh after having gone through the report submitted by the trial Court and other material available on record has recorded no objection if the listed application is allowed and direction is issued to the NADRA authorities for unblocking the CNIC of applicant Mukhtiar Chandio son of Abdul Kareem. In view of above, CMA No.6697/2024 is allowed and Director General NADRA is directed to unblock CNIC No.42201-0461241-9 of applicant Mukhtiar Chandio son of Abdul Kareem Chandio forthwith. J U D G E Gulsher/PS
